message:
feat(term): add TermRenderConfig for terminal rendering options

Adds configuration struct controlling terminal diagram rendering behavior
including tier selection, glyph modes, size constraints, and visual options.

TermRenderConfig fields:
- tier: Rendering fidelity (Compact/Normal/Rich/Auto)
- render_mode: Sub-cell rendering (CellOnly/Braille/Block/HalfBlock/Auto)
- glyph_mode: Unicode box-drawing vs ASCII fallback
- max_width/max_height: Terminal size constraints
- max_label_chars/max_label_lines: Text truncation limits
- show_selection/show_clusters: Visual feature toggles
- diagonal_edges: Edge routing optimization
- padding: Diagram margin in cells

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
